title: Creating a JSON Schema for Nested Data
scenario: Design a JSON schema for a nested data structure representing a fictional company's organizational chart. The schema should include attributes for employee name, job title, department, and a list of direct reports. The schema must specify the data types, maximum lengths, and possible values for each field. Use a specific namespace and ensure the schema is self-descriptive and easy to understand for developers.
constraints: Must include a property for a list of direct reports

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated JSON schema is well-formed, valid, and self-descriptive.
Verify that the schema includes constraints for valid data types and lengths (e.g., string, integer, array).
Evaluate the readability and maintainability of the schema, including comments and documentation.
